_doc: Calibrated selectors for the Square KDS Performance Report (https://app.squareup.com/dashboard/kitchen/reports/performance). Used by download_kds_report() in runner.py.
verified_by: Live browser exploration via user-playwright MCP

date_picker.date_text_trigger: Click on the displayed date text (e.g. '05/28/2026') to open the calendar picker.
date_picker.calendar_day_selector: [data-test-calendar-month-day='M/D'] — e.g. [data-test-calendar-month-day='5/20'] for May 20. Month is numeric without leading zero, day without leading zero.
date_picker.month_back_arrow: Button with aria-label containing 'previous' or '<' inside the calendar header, navigates to the prior month.
date_picker.month_header: The month/year label inside the calendar header (e.g. 'May 2026') — check this to know if month navigation is needed.

report_controls.run_report_button: button with name 'Run report' — triggers report generation after date selection.
report_controls.generate_button: button with name 'Generate' — starts async CSV generation inside the export popover.

table_layout_reference.notes: Table appears after Run Report completes. Export produces a per-ticket CSV with: Device Name, Ticket Name, Order Source, Number of Items, Items in Ticket, Completion Time (seconds), Time Created, Time Completed, Time Due, Time Recalled.
